PSG filename: subject identification
Method used to split the sleep period in sleep cycles, it defines the criteria. I.e. : 'Minimum criteria'  'Aeschbach 1993'  'Feinberg 1979'
Include a REM sleep periods (REMP) that occur within 15 minutes of sleep onset.
Include the last sleep cycle even if the NREM period (NREMP) or REMP does not meet the minimum duration criteria.
Minimum length without R stage to end the REMP.
Minimum length of the first NREMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the middle and last NREMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the NREMP in minutes to validate the last sleep cycle.
Minimum length of the first REMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the middle REMP in minutes.
Minimum length of the last REMP in minutes.
Move the end of the REMP to the start of the following NREMP, eliminating the temporal 'gap' between 2 cycles.
List of valid stages used to define the sleep cycles:  'N1, N2, N3, R' or 'N2, N3, R'
